name: Mastodon
summary: Decentralized microblog network across federated instances.
description: Mastodon profiles are instance-scoped: the canonical URL form is '<instance>/@<handle>' (e.g. https://hachyderm.io/@acme). The catalog cannot fix a single base URL â€” store full URLs as values, or '@<handle>@<instance>' as the rendered handle. The profileUrlPattern below is illustrative and assumes mastodon.social as a fallback.
